doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: This document describes a non-existent protocol and claims a regulatory authority to waive statutory law that the State Bar does not possess.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 100
REASON: No such protocol exists, and the State Bar of California does not have the authority to unilaterally waive Business & Professions Code §6125 via a commission memo.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 100
REASON: This document describes a non-existent protocol and claims a regulatory authority to waive statutory law that the State Bar does not possess.
